name: FETAL DEATH IN UTERO
definition: INTRAUTERINE DEMISE fetal death during 2nd + 3rd trimesters disappearance of one twin in utero ← complete resorption / anembryonic pregnancy compression + mummification of fetus

demographics.Path: resorption of fluid resulting in paperlike fetal body + compression into adjacent

discriminating_features: same / decreased BPD measurement compared to prior exam

general: same / decreased BPD measurement compared to prior exam
increased amount of echoes in amniotic fluid (= fetal tissue fragments)
NO sonographic evidence of twin pregnancy later in pregnancy
compressed mummified fetus plastered against uterine wall
